items.title: MFA enforced for App+User Partner Center API access
items.impact: From this date all App+User usage of Partner Center APIs requires the MFA claim; non-compliant calls are rejected.
items.action: Generate the secure-app-model refresh token via an MFA sign-in; use GET /v1/partnerRequests (mfaCompliant) to find non-compliant callers; send ValidateMfa: true to verify.

items.title: Azure AD Graph (graph.windows.net) audience retired for Partner Center
items.impact: Tokens with the graph.windows.net audience return 401 / 900420.

items.title: DAP (delegated admin privileges) replaced by GDAP
items.impact: Open-ended DAP relationships are removed; admin-on-behalf-of needs granular, time-bound GDAP.
items.action: Create GDAP relationships (Microsoft Graph) and request only the Entra roles each operation needs.

items.title: Partner Center .NET SDK 3.4.0 archived
items.impact: The SDK is unmaintained; Microsoft directs partners to the REST APIs.
items.action: Call the Partner Center REST APIs directly (use pc_migrate_from_sdk to translate).

items.title: v1 unbilled reconciliation (NCE) API deprecated
items.impact: The v1 /v1/invoices/unbilled/lineitems NCE API is deprecated and will be retired.
items.action: Move to the async v2 Microsoft Graph unbilled export (reports/partners/billing/reconciliation/unbilled/export).

items.title: v1 billed reconciliation API in feature freeze
items.impact: The v1 billed reconciliation endpoint is frozen; new-commerce billed recon after this date uses the v2 Graph API.
items.action: Use the async v2 Microsoft Graph billed export (reports/partners/billing/reconciliation/billed/export).

items.title: ADAL retired; use MSAL
items.impact: Azure AD Authentication Library (ADAL) is end-of-life.
items.action: Use MSAL with the secure application model.

items.title: AzureAD / MSOnline PowerShell modules deprecated
items.impact: The AzureAD and MSOnline modules are deprecated and being retired.
items.action: Use Microsoft Graph PowerShell (and the community Partner Center PowerShell module).
